ideation: This animation sequence simulates the action of proudly displaying a name badge.  The robot will hold the badge (represented by the space between its hands) at chest height, ensuring it's visible. The movement will be deliberate and confident. Frame 1 starts with both arms at the sides.  Frame 2 shows both arms moving upward and slightly inward. Frame 3 shows the hands positioned to display the badge, with the wrists slightly rotated to showcase the badge effectively. Frame 4 shows the arms holding the badge steadily, maintaining a confident posture. Frame 5 returns the robot's arms to a relaxed position.

frames.beat: arms hang at the sides, ready to present
arms lift smoothly upward, bringing the badge into view
hands position to proudly display the badge
badge held steady, a confident presentation
arms return to a relaxed, neutral pose
